text:
やあ、やる気になって
くれたみたいだね。

今回はアークスグランプリの
決勝のほうだよ。

予選や本戦とはまた違うと思うけど
きみの実力であれば
些細な差かもしれないね。

ともかく私は
きみの結果がとても楽しみなのさ。
Well, look who's rarin' to go again!

Looks like it's high noon--or shall I say,
time for the finals of the ARKS Grand Prix.

It's like to be a different animal from the
prelims and the regular matches. But I doubt
it'll faze an old hand like you, pardner.

Can't wait to see what type
of show you put on.
